title: Surgeon Vacancy at Wockhardt Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Wockhardt Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!
